message:
test(fcp-conformance): bind suite negotiation spec to public negotiate_suite

Adds a conformance test file that imports fcp_protocol::session::{
negotiate_suite, SessionCryptoSuite, MINIMUM_SUITE} directly and mirrors
each MUST clause from docs/protocol/session-handshake.md:

- responder-picks first preference
- initiator ordering is not consulted
- malicious initiator cannot downgrade
- floor-level suite acceptance
- MINIMUM_SUITE equals current weakest (structural invariant)
- no-overlap → None
- empty inputs → None
- determinism under fixed inputs
- totality: Some iff mutual suite at/above floor exists

The existing mirror in fcp_conformance::interop::session is a local
string-typed shadow of negotiate_suite — per crkft ADR §Conformance
helper — so if the real function drifts from spec, the shadow's tests
pass while the public API fails. This file binds the spec to the real
public API, closing that gap.

9/9 tests pass.

Cod_4 / SunnyMoose (CONFORMANCE auditor)
